final:
module RefModule (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    output reg [7:0] q
);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (reset) 
    begin
        q <= 8'b10000000;
    end 
    else 
    begin
        q <= {q[6:0], ~q[7]};
    end
end

endmodule
